_comment_2: Tyk Classic API definition for p09-resp-headers. The canonical contract is: gateway adds X-Bench-Out: 1 to the downstream response and drops the Server header from the downstream response, on every endpoint.
_comment_3: transform_response_headers in extended_paths runs in Tyk's response chain after the upstream returns and before the gateway writes the response to the client. add_headers and delete_headers operate on the canonical-MIME header form.
_comment_4: Wildcard path `{rest:.*}` makes transform_response_headers apply to every request the API serves — necessary because the fixture probes /response-headers and /get (not /anything).
name: bench
